item.title: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky shared an emotional embrace with a World War II veteran during an event to mark the 80th anniversary of D-Day in France.
item.dc:creator: EngineerNGR

item.title: Day 1 of making my BG3 Shadowheart Wavemother's Robe Cosplay - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.youtube.com/@yuzupyon Hi everyone I am back with a new crafting project! After I did my chainmail Irulan cosplay, I kept thinking about the next project I should do, and decided to go for this one! I hope you like it, if you're interested to see more of my process videos please check out my Youtube Channel, and for final result pics I post them on my https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon Hopefully I can finish this project in time for Anime Expo this year! :) Wishing you abgreat day, YuzuPyon Note : Please PAUSE TO READ TEXT I know it's pretty fast but the text is only optional for people who want more infos, will make long form video tutorials on my YT channel in the future, in the meantime social media platforms (and Imgur alike) limit videos to 60 seconds, it is what it is.
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.dc:creator: cyounghmfce

item.title: *inhale peace, exhale stupid, inhale peace, exhale stupid* who wants to explain the word "sterile" to him?
item.description: Edit: This is a real Dunning Kruger effect and I don't mean that as an insult. A lot of people have never thought about how big a hospital is and how clean it has to be. Think if a pt vomits on the wall and its green will anyone even notice? imagine what could be passed on in that time. if there are fake plants they collect dust, insects, etc, and they need to be thoroughly cleaned. Floors are white so you can see bodily fluids more easily. Imagine someone urinating on the floor, but because of the color its hard to tell if its water or urine when cleaning. after cleaning 400 rooms that day maybe the Janitor thinks they hit that spot already and leaves it. Its a huge knowledge gap that people don't always think about but staggeringly important.
item.dc:creator: softspokensatan

item.title: Who wants to bathe with this beauty?

item.dc:creator: exploradoresciclos2018

item.title: PRIDE POST: Socially transitioning, here was my cosplay for RETRO X
item.description:
Honestly, I think I NAILED it! I stand at 6ft flat-footed, with the added height from the boots and the hair I was probably about 6'5"!!!
I pieced my outfit together with things I already had: an old wig that I spent about 3 hours hacking into the right shape, stretchy lace top and matching lace gloves, a feather collar I bought for reasons I can't remember, a Venetian mask, crystal ball I've had for decades, the grave stompers that don't see much use anymore because I have to wear orthotics now, black leggings, a BMO beanie stuffed in place to create a comedically huge bulge, AND the Goblin King's pendant (a birthday gift)!!
Everything was so stretchy and comfortable! It only took a few minutes to get in and out of costume, so I was able to relax for 4 hours between the con and the after party (which was not necessary because I was the only one who showed up in costume). This was my first try at a masculine cosplay, and it was so exciting to have so many people come up to me to ask for a picture! My partner played photographer, he said that he wished I could have seen the delighted reactions as I walked past people, but I DANCED WITH THE GOBLIN KING at an anime convention masquerade over a decade ago and remember just how delighted I was! As I'm moving forward with my social transition, I'm becoming more confident in my masculinity, but because I live in such a hostile area for LGBTQ+ folks I have trouble leaving the house dressed as a man (as myself?) unless it's for a private event with security. I'm planning an accurate Beetlejuice costume for Halloween this year! Hold onto your LYDIAS or else they're ALL coming home with me!
item.dc:creator: Ryvienna

item.title: Just Singing To The Birds.
item.description: Hi Imgurian, thank you for the Entertaining Accolade! Did you know that Bob Smith was the first openly gay comedian to appear on The Tonight Show and the first openly gay comedian to have a HBO comedy half hour? Now you do!✨ https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bob_Smith_(comedian) Oh Imgurian, can I treat you to a trivia tidbit? As a way to say thank you for the awesome Entertaining Accolade. Suzanne Westenhoefer was the first openly lesbian comic on television. On the Sally Jesse Raphael show, entitled 'Breaking the Lesbian Stereotype'. She also was the first gay comic on Late Night With David Letterman. Her HBO half hour special was nominated for a cable Ace Award.✨ https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Suzanne_Westenhoefer
item.dc:creator: HorrorMango

item.title: Images of Note: Worse than Bouillon
item.description:
Imagine
Well
A m e r i c a
This basically happened when Jon Kent Superman got a boyfriend.
THE WIZARD [Guitar Solo]
The popular image of the 1950s being all perfect families and malt shops is a lie that too many people buy into.
http://discord.abbii.gay http://mastodon.abbii.gay http://tumblr.abbii.gay http://twitch.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
